name: Misteri Cempaka Tersepit
overview:
"Don’t talk to the woman in the red kebaya!"

Three close friends throw a bachelor party at a secluded resort. However, during their stay, they encounter a mysterious and beautiful woman dressed in a red kebaya. Her sudden appearance begins to tear their friendship apart, as each of them becomes obsessed with winning her heart. But who is this woman, really?
